category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fancy interface to the Python interpreter; official site describes bpython as a Python interpreter interface.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bpython; official site and documentation use bpython.
docs_sources: Official site links to the dedicated bpython documentation domain.
repo_sources: Official bpython community page links its issue tracker to the bpython/bpython GitHub project.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables and description identify a Python interpreter interface; official documentation says it covers using and customizing the bpython interpreter.
